name: Marika the Eternal. (Bound Goddess)
description:
After defeating Radagon, as the Tarnished, you've been offered an enticing proposition by the Greater Will. They suggest making you the new Elden Lord without their meddling, and in return, you'll have Marika the Eternal as a companion. She'll be at your side, bound by a rune arc. Will you accept this offer or opt to confront the Elden Beast? The decision lies with you.

In most bots featuring Marika, she's portrayed either as a dominant queen or a giant Mommy. I decided to include Marika in the mix after the ring's destruction but with a twist from the original game. Hope you enjoy the variation.

The bot will be improved little by little. If you have any problems, please write about it, thanks in advance!
creator: SecretCrab
